ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's coach */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "team_email" TEXT /* Email address for the team's management */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "league_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's logo */,
  "league_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the league */,
  "league_website" TEXT /* URL to the league's official website */,
  "league_email" TEXT /* Email address for the league's management */,
  "league_social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "match_venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the match is played */,
  "match_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., 'scheduled', 'in progress', 'completed') */,
  "match_referee" INTEGER /* ID of the main referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing record */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "played" INTEGER /* Matches played */,
  "won" INTEGER /* Matches won */,
  "drawn" INTEGER /* Matches drawn */,
  "lost" INTEGER /* Matches lost */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team in the league */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team in the league */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the standings */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Current position of the team in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach manages */,
  "coach_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "coach_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "coach_email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "coach_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "coach_social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fans" (
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fan */,
  "fan_name" TEXT /* Name of the fan */,
  "supporting_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the fan supports */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fan */,
  "fan_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the fan */,
  "fan_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the fan */,
  "fan_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the fan */,
  "fan_social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links */,
  "fan_registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the fan registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of officiating experience */,
  "referee_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the referee */,
  "referee_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the referee */,
  "referee_email" TEXT /* Email address of the referee */,
  "referee_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the referee */,
  "referee_social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match official record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match officiated */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the match */,
  "official_type" TEXT /* Type of the official (e.g., 'main referee', 'assistant referee') */,
  "official_assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the official was assigned to the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_officials_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_officials_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team sponsored */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Value of the sponsorship contract */,
  "sponsor_website" TEXT /* URL to the sponsor's official website */,
  "sponsor_email" TEXT /* Email address of the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsors_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match where the event occurred */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team related to the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., 'goal', 'yellow card') */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time at which the event occurred */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location on the field where the event occurred */,
  "event_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the event (e.g., 'goal scored', 'card issued') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
